title: adenoderris glandulosa
intro: Adenoderris glandulosa, also known as golden seal or coltsfoot, is a perennial plant native to North America with a long history of medicinal use. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and glycosides. The health benefits of Adenoderris glandulosa include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for colds, coughs, and bronchitis. Adenoderris glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
